touches.ai_summary: Initial LinkedIn outreach to Wyatt Brooks introducing our onboarding automation solution. Wyatt responded positively, mentioned they're currently evaluating options to streamline CS onboarding workflows.

questions_asked.question: What specifically does your platform automate in the onboarding process?
questions_asked.answer: We automate task assignment, documentation delivery, milestone tracking, and personalized communications throughout the customer journey.

next_steps: Schedule qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: 19-minute qualification call with Wyatt Brooks. Discussed MatrixPathway's current manual onboarding process for healthcare IT clients, pain points around inconsistent customer experiences and CS team bandwidth. Wyatt confirmed budget authority and timeline for Q2 implementation.

questions_asked.question: How many customers are you onboarding per month currently?
questions_asked.answer: We're averaging 12-15 new healthcare customers monthly, each requiring 20+ hours of CS time.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency to solve this now?
questions_asked.answer: Our CS team is at capacity and we're seeing onboarding timelines slip, which is affecting renewal rates.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline for your solution?
questions_asked.answer: Standard implementation is 4-6 weeks depending on complexity and customization needs.

next_steps: Wyatt to review deck with CS leadership

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sharing qualification call recap, ROI calculator, and case study from similar healthcare IT company. Wyatt confirmed he shared materials with Owen Lim (SVP Revenue) and wants to discuss technical requirements.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM and support ticketing system?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with most major CRMs and ticketing platforms. Will confirm specifics on discovery call.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call to review technical requirements

touches.ai_summary: Brief email exchange confirming discovery call agenda. Wyatt requested to include Ethan Le (Account Manager) in technical discussions as he'll be managing day-to-day usage.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for Thursday with Wyatt and Ethan

touches.ai_summary: 23-minute discovery call with Wyatt Brooks. Deep dive into current onboarding workflow, specific automation needs, and success metrics. Discussed team size (21 CS/AM seats needed) and use cases around task automation, email sequencing, and progress tracking.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your ideal automated onboarding flow from contract signature to first value.
questions_asked.answer: We want automated welcome sequences, self-service resource libraries, milestone-based check-ins, and escalation triggers when customers fall behind schedule.

questions_asked.question: How customizable are the automation workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable through our visual workflow builder. You can create conditional logic, custom triggers, and personalized content.

questions_asked.question: What kind of reporting do you provide on onboarding effectiveness?
questions_asked.answer: Dashboard shows time-to-value, completion rates, engagement scores, and bottleneck identification across your customer cohorts.

next_steps: Schedule demo for Ethan next week

touches.ai_summary: Sent discovery recap with technical requirements questionnaire and demo scheduling link. Wyatt confirmed Ethan Le will lead technical evaluation and Benjamin Sato (RevOps) will assess data/reporting needs.

Follow-up email sharing additional resources on unlimited automation tier benefits. Wyatt mentioned they're trying to finalize before end of quarter and need pricing guidance to get internal approvals moving.

questions_asked.question: What's the ballpark pricing for 21 seats with unlimited automation?
questions_asked.answer: For your team size and use case, typically $18-22K annually. Will provide detailed proposal after technical evaluation.

touches.ai_summary: 74-minute technical deep dive with Ethan Le covering platform capabilities, integration architecture, workflow builder demo, and security/compliance requirements for healthcare data. Ethan tested several automation scenarios and asked detailed questions about API limits and customization.

questions_asked.question: What are the API rate limits and do they apply to the unlimited automation tier?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited tier has no automation execution limits. API rate limits are 10K requests/hour which is well above typical usage patterns.

questions_asked.question: Can we build custom fields and objects or are we limited to your data model?
questions_asked.answer: You can create custom fields, tags, and metadata. Core objects are standardized but highly extensible.

questions_asked.question: How does data residency work for healthcare compliance?
questions_asked.answer: We offer US-only data residency and are HIPAA compliant with BAA available.

questions_asked.question: What would be your top priority use case to prove value quickly?
questions_asked.answer: Automating our new customer welcome sequence and documentation delivery would save 5+ hours per customer immediately.

objections: Some of the integrations we need are in beta, concerned about stability

touches.ai_summary: Post-demo follow-up with sandbox access credentials and integration documentation. Ethan confirmed he'll test workflows this week. Wyatt mentioned Owen Lim wants to understand ROI projections before moving forward.

42-minute follow-up technical session with Ethan Le reviewing his sandbox testing results. He successfully built two automation workflows and validated CRM integration. Discussed edge cases and asked about scaling as customer volume grows.

questions_asked.question: If we grow to 30+ customers per month, will performance degrade?
questions_asked.answer: No, the platform is built to scale. We have customers running 100+ concurrent onboarding workflows without performance issues.

questions_asked.question: What level of support comes with the unlimited tier?
questions_asked.answer: Priority email/chat support, dedicated CSM, and quarterly business reviews. Phone support available as add-on.

questions_asked.question: What's your confidence level in recommending this to Wyatt and Owen?
questions_asked.answer: Pretty high. The platform does what we need. Main concern is making sure we have resources for implementation and ongoing maintenance.

next_steps: Ethan to provide technical approval to Wyatt

touches.ai_summary: Email recap of technical evaluation outcome. Wyatt confirmed Ethan gave technical approval and they're ready for formal proposal. Mentioned they need to stay within $16K budget to avoid additional approvals.
next_steps: Schedule proposal review with Wyatt and Owen Lim

touches.ai_summary: Sent formal proposal for 21 seats, unlimited automation tier at $18,900 annually. Wyatt responded that pricing is above their approved budget and needs to be closer to $15K to move forward without escalating to CFO.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on pricing or alternative packaging to meet our budget?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with leadership. We may have some room to work with given your use case and potential for expansion.

next_steps: Executive meeting with Owen Lim to discuss value and budget

touches.ai_summary: 23-minute executive meeting with Owen Lim and Wyatt Brooks. Owen asked direct questions about ROI timeline, competitive differentiation, and why they should choose us over building in-house. Discussed strategic value beyond immediate CS efficiency.

questions_asked.question: What's the realistic timeline to see ROI on a $15-18K investment?
questions_asked.answer: Based on your volume, 5 hours saved per customer at 12-15 customers monthly, you'll see payback in 4-5 months assuming $75/hour CS cost.

questions_asked.question: We've discussed building this internally. Why should we buy vs. build?
questions_asked.answer: Time to value is 6 weeks vs. 6+ months for custom build, plus ongoing maintenance and feature development we handle. Your team focuses on customers, not infrastructure.

questions_asked.question: What would make this a no-brainer decision for you?
questions_asked.answer: Pricing needs to be within our Q2 budget parameters, and I need confidence in implementation timeline and support.

touches.ai_summary: 24-minute pricing call with Wyatt Brooks. Presented revised offer at $16,200 with extended payment terms. Wyatt pushed for $15K flat to align with budget approval. Discussed potential for multi-year commitment to bridge gap.

questions_asked.question: Would a two-year commitment get us to the $15K annual price point?
questions_asked.answer: For two-year commit we could do $15,700 per year. That's about the floor for unlimited automation tier at your seat count.

questions_asked.question: Is two-year commitment feasible given this is a new vendor relationship?
questions_asked.answer: Probably not for first purchase. We typically do annual with option to extend.

objections: Budget is firm at $15K, anything above requires CFO approval which adds 3-4 weeks
next_steps: Explore one-year at $15,700 with performance guarantees

touches.ai_summary: 14-minute pricing follow-up call. Wyatt confirmed $15,700 is workable if we can include extra implementation support and commitment to quarterly ROI reviews. Discussed contract terms and success metrics.

questions_asked.question: Can we include a performance guarantee or exit clause if we don't hit ROI targets?
questions_asked.answer: We can include quarterly ROI reviews and early termination option after 6 months if success metrics aren't met.

next_steps: Draft final agreement at $15,700 with enhanced support terms

touches.ai_summary: 31-minute negotiation call with Wyatt Brooks reviewing final contract terms. Discussed implementation timeline, training schedule, data migration support, and performance guarantees. Wyatt requested minor adjustments to payment terms and auto-renewal clause.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We can do semi-annual payments (two installments) to help with cash flow.

questions_asked.question: What's the auto-renewal notice period?
questions_asked.answer: Standard is 30 days, but we can extend to 60 days for your contract.

questions_asked.question: Are we aligned on all terms now or are there other approvals needed?
questions_asked.answer: I need Owen to sign off on the final terms and payment schedule, then we can move to legal review.

objections: Standard contract has auto-renewal language that's more aggressive than our procurement team typically accepts

touches.ai_summary: 19-minute executive approval meeting with Owen Lim. Reviewed final pricing ($15,700, 21 seats, unlimited automation), implementation plan, and performance guarantees. Owen approved moving forward pending legal review. Asked about expansion pricing if they grow team.

questions_asked.question: If we add seats mid-year, what's the pricing model?
questions_asked.answer: Pro-rated for remainder of term at same per-seat rate, or we can true-up at renewal.

questions_asked.question: Any other stakeholders who need to weigh in before legal review?
questions_asked.answer: No, Wyatt and I have authority. Legal review should be straightforward, 1-2 weeks max.

next_steps: Send final contract to MatrixPathway legal
Target signature by end of quarter

touches.ai_summary: 30-minute pricing and contract finalization call with Wyatt Brooks. Legal review complete with minor redlines addressed. Confirmed implementation kickoff date, primary stakeholders for onboarding, and success metrics. Wyatt committed to signature by end of week.

questions_asked.question: Who will be our main point of contact for implementation?
questions_asked.answer: You'll have dedicated implementation consultant for first 6 weeks, then transition to ongoing CSM.

questions_asked.question: What do you need from us to ensure smooth implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Access to CRM/ticketing systems, 2-3 hours per week from Ethan for workflow setup, and commitment from CS team for training sessions.

questions_asked.question: Are we good to proceed with signature this week?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I'll route for Owen's signature tomorrow. Should have fully executed contract by Friday.
